home.name: I'm
home.subtitle: IT Administrator, Developer & Automation Expert
home.description: Passionate developer focused on Identity Management, Home Automation and System Integration. I develop innovative solutions that connect HR data with IT infrastructure and automate processes.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: I'm Fabian Seitz
about.text1: As an IT Administrator and Developer with extensive experience in Microsoft Administration, SAP Basis and Automation, I develop innovative solutions for complex IT challenges.
about.text2: My expertise includes developing Identity Management systems that seamlessly connect HR data (SAP R3 HCM) with IT infrastructure (Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID). With my project faneX-ID, I have created a central platform that automatically manages the entire Employee Lifecycle.
about.text3: In addition to my professional work, I passionately develop Home Assistant integrations and add-ons that extend and automate smart home systems. My projects range from PowerShell automation scripts to Python-based system integrations to modern web applications with React and FastAPI.
about.text4: Additionally, I am engaged as a lecturer at the Adult Education Center (VHS), where I share my knowledge in IT topics and programming with interested learners. This activity allows me to convey complex technical concepts in an understandable way while continuously learning myself.
about.text5: I am always committed to developing thoughtful, scalable and user-friendly solutions that solve real problems and make processes more efficient.

faserf.title: The Story Behind FaserF
faserf.text1: As a child, I was sometimes called "Faser" by my family and friends - a loving nickname that was given to me.
faserf.text2: The trailing "F" stands for my first name Fabian, which is how the name FaserF came about.
faserf.text3: This name has accompanied me since my childhood and has become my online identity name, which I use on GitHub, in projects and in the developer community.
